title: callicarpa micrantha
intro: Callicarpa micrantha, also known as the small-fruit purple bellwort or small-fruit Mexican bellwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Callicarpa micrantha are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of Callicarpa micrantha include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent.
